headline: Southwest Ties New Digital Leadership And Perks To Lofty LUV Valuation
summary: Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) appoints Sabrina Callahan as its first Chief Digital and Marketing Officer. The airline launches Sip and Ship, a program that lets customers check a case of wine at no extra charge from select airports. Route expansion continues into key markets, reflecting a focus on customer programs alongside network growth. Southwest Airlines operates as a major U.S. low cost carrier, competing on frequency, customer service, and fare structure across its domestic and near...
